reasoning: This sequence mimics the gentle, flowing movement of a jellyfish. The arms will move in a wave-like pattern, suggesting the pulsating motion of the creature. The animation will use both arms, moving them in a synchronized but slightly offset manner to create a sense of fluidity.  The wrists will remain neutral, suggesting a relaxed, non-threatening pose.  The overall feel will be calm and graceful. Frame 1: Arms start slightly raised and angled outward, mimicking the relaxed posture of a jellyfish at rest. Frame 2: Arms move upward and outward, suggesting the upward pulse of the jellyfish. Frame 3: Arms move slightly downward and inward, suggesting a gentle recoil. Frame 4: Arms return to a position similar to frame 1, completing a full cycle of movement.
